autoSaved: Settings are saved automatically and synced across devices.
bgFxHint: Flame background in menus. Turn off to save battery.
cinematicsHint: A short (2–3 s) cinematic pop-up when summoning a Legendary/Champion or using a Champion skill. Tap to skip.
contentInfo: Cards, sounds and videos are stored on your phone — the game runs fast and works offline. Downloaded:
languageHint: Your language is saved to your account and applied on all devices. Card text, images and voice-over follow the interface language.
remindersHint: A daily reminder about your daily reward and battle so you don't lose your streak. Notifications are shown on phone only.
summonFxHint: When off, creature summon visual effects are hidden in battles (better for low-end devices).
title: SETTINGS
videoHint: Video (cinematics, avatar animations) is the largest part; download over Wi-Fi.

voice.title: Voice language
voice.fallback: No voice in the chosen language → play the Lithuanian one
voice.hint: Card and avatar voice lines. If there is no voice in your language and this is off, the line is simply not played (sound effects still work).
